components.label: Actions: Update Non-Punitive Scholastic Standing Withdrawal
HTML
components.content: This form is used to reverse the eligibility impacts of a withdrawal when certain criteria have been met.

components.label: Please select the application that has been withdrawn that you would like to be converted to non-punitive status.
Please indicate which of the following circumstances applies to you.

values.label: I did not attend classes at all and repaid the funding in full within 30 days of the start of classes.
I attended classes for 10 days or less and repaid the funding in full within 30 days of the start of classes.

I completed my first semester, including exams (if applicable), and either did not return to my studies or attended for 10 days or less in the next semester. The funding for the second semester was either not issued to me or it was and repaid in full within 30 days of the start of classes.
I was withdrawn from my studies as the result of an institution closure.

components.label: Eligible Circumstances Banner
components.content: If you withdrew from your studies for one of the reasons listed above, your withdrawal may be changed to a non-punitive withdrawal. This means the withdrawal will not affect your eligibility for further StudentAid BC funding. Your withdrawal must be reported to StudentAid BC by your institution before you can submit this form.
